overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from Cyberpunk 2077 showing a character jogging along a futuristic city sidewalk during golden hour. The character passes moving traffic, metal railings, and a neon-lit restaurant before continuing toward a distant pedestrian overpass in a dense urban environment.

scene_state.functional_zone: city sidewalk with metal traffic railing

agents.ego_description: jogging steadily along the sidewalk, passing a pedestrian in an orange jacket and approaching seated NPCs on benches

notable_agents.action: pedestrian in orange jacket walking ahead on the sidewalk, soon to be overtaken by ego
two people sitting on a concrete bench outside a building

entered.detail: silver metal barrier separating sidewalk from multi-lane street
futuristic cars and buses moving along the road
tall modern glass building with reflective windows dominating the left skyline
elevated walkway crossing over the street in the distance
concrete bench with people seated outside a building
tall palm trees visible against the skyline

segments.scene_description: The segment opens with a third-person view following a character jogging along a concrete sidewalk bordered by a metal railing. Traffic flows on the left while two people sit on a bench to the right. The warm golden hour light illuminates a distant glass skyscraper and pedestrian overpass ahead.

scene_state.functional_zone: commercial sidewalk with neon restaurant frontage

events.description: entering the glow of bright red and cyan neon signage from the Okie Grill restaurant

agents.ego_description: continuing to jog forward past the restaurant storefront with prominent neon illumination

entered.detail: low-rise commercial building with dark facade housing the Okie Grill restaurant
bright red neon sign reading 'OKIE GRILL & SQUID' with cyan accent lighting

segments.scene_description: The character runs past the metal railing's end and enters a zone dominated by the Okie Grill restaurant's vibrant neon signage. The red and cyan lights cast colored reflections on the sidewalk while traffic continues to flow on the left. The pedestrian overpass remains visible in the distance ahead.

events.description: exiting the neon-lit restaurant zone into open sidewalk with natural lighting

agents.ego_description: jogging toward the distant pedestrian overpass as the restaurant falls behind

segments.scene_description: Having passed the restaurant, the character continues along the open sidewalk as the neon signage disappears behind. The pedestrian overpass grows slightly larger in the center of the frame while maintaining the same urban backdrop of glass towers and flowing traffic.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement along a futuristic city sidewalk that transitions from a sun-drenched urban path into a neon-lit commercial zone before opening back up toward a distant overpass. It begins by following a character jogging past a metal railing and a couple resting on a bench, with warm golden hour light illuminating a glass skyscraper ahead. As the character moves forward, the scene shifts into the vibrant glow of the Okie Grill, where red and cyan neon signage casts colorful reflections across the concrete. The camera then continues past the restaurant as the neon lights fade behind, allowing the urban backdrop of flowing traffic and glass towers to expand. Finally, the view centers on the pedestrian overpass as it grows larger in the frame, marking the end of the journey through the dense city environment.
